name: ncr_number_present
expression: ncr_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(ncr_number)) > 0
description: ncr_number is required for Nonconformance Report extraction.

name: ncr_date_present
expression: ncr_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(ncr_date)) > 0
description: ncr_date is required for Nonconformance Report extraction.

name: part_number_present
expression: part_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(part_number)) > 0
description: part_number is required for Nonconformance Report extraction.

name: nonconformance_description_present
expression: nonconformance_description IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(nonconformance_description)) > 0
description: nonconformance_description is required for Nonconformance Report extraction.

name: disposition_present
expression: disposition IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(disposition)) > 0
description: disposition is required for Nonconformance Report extraction.

name: quantity_affected_non_negative
description: quantity_affected should be non-negative when present.
